description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted pants, and ankle-high shoes. The figure wears a flat cap and glasses, adding a touch of personality and suggesting a modern, city-dwelling character. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the posture is upright and neutral. The facial features are defined, with a short, neat hairstyle visible beneath the cap. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle anatomical details. The clothing fits closely, with visible seams and folds, and the shoes have a simple, practical design suitable for walking in an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male figure with a flat cap, glasses, button-up shirt, fitted pants, and ankle-high shoes, standing upright in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, glasses, flat cap, button-up shirt, and relaxed hand position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, shirt, pants, and shoes, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted pants, flat cap, and glasses
